title: strophacanthus terminalis
intro: Strophacanthus terminalis, also known as the 'Terminalis', is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing symptoms of fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of wounds. Strophacanthus terminalis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and its leaves can be dried and used in various forms, such as capsules or tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
